title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches for Silicone Tent and Tarp Repair,
description:
Quickly patch up silnylon tents and tarps with Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches. Apply these peel-and-stick patches to permanently repair all types of silnylon and nylon gear including hammocks, backpacks and stuff sacks. Made of strong, ripstop nylon fabric and backed by a waterproof silicone-based adhesive, this repair kit includes two 3” x 5” sheer patches to blend with all colors – creating a clean and translucent repair. Like all Tenacious Tape, these patches are weatherproof and washable, so repairs won’t peel back over time. Only silicone adhesives bond to silicone, so these patches are a simple solution to ripped or torn silicone-treated gear. Fix torn, ultralight gear fast without the mess using Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches.

GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches for Silicone Tent and Tarp Repair,

Quickly patch up silnylon tents and tarps with Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches. Apply these peel-and-stick patches to permanently repair all types of silnylon and nylon gear including hammocks, backpacks and stuff sacks. Made of strong, ripstop nylon fabric and backed by a waterproof silicone-based adhesive, this repair kit includes two 3” x 5” sheer patches to blend with all colors – creating a clean and translucent repair. Like all Tenacious Tape, these patches are weatherproof and washable, so repairs won’t peel back over time. Only silicone adhesives bond to silicone, so these patches are a simple solution to ripped or torn silicone-treated gear. Fix torn, ultralight gear fast without the mess using Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches.

Key Features

  • Make a quick, permanent repair with peel-and stick patches backed by a silicone-based adhesive that sticks to silnylon tents and tarps
  • Apply to silicone-treated fabrics and materials including silpoly, nylon, vinyl, and even rubber; kit includes two sheer, ripstop nylon patches (3”x5”)
  • Use it to patch up holes and tears on ultralight backpacks, hammocks, stuff sacks, ponchos and sleeping bags
  • Fix rips with this washable patch featuring a waterproof silicone coating that can stand up to machine washing and stormy weather
  • Be prepared for tears with an easy repair that actually works on silnylon gear; only silicone adhesives bond to silicone

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 10670
  • UPC: 21563106701
